objective:
Objectif:
Dans le marché 0GUSDC en 1h, utiliser les familles robustes de signaux detectedes telles que breakout et momentum pour la stratégie de trading avec EMA + OBV et BOLLINGER + STOCHASTIC. Cependant, veiller à ne pas réutiliser au moins deux dimensions d'ancrages positifs (direction, filtre ou risque management) pour éviter l'imitation et le mauvais contrôle de la diversité.

Comportements aleatoires imposés: Priorisez des paires rares d'indicateurs tels que RSI + AROON, MA + STDEV, DOCHIAN + EMA, etc., pour ajouter un filtre horaire/horodatage de liquidité.

En termes plus pratiques: Utilisons les signaux robustes comme RSI+AROON, BOLLER+STOCHASTIC, SMA+EMA et l'ajout d'un filtre horaire pour la session ou la liquidite dans notre stratégie de trading. Cependant, il est important de ne pas réutiliser au moins deux dimensions des ancrages positifs existants (direction, filtration ou gestion du risque) et éviter les formulations génériques typiques

iterations.hypothesis: Robust signals such as RSI+AROON, BOLLER+STOCHASTIC, SMA+EMA with a temporal filter for rare combinations of indicators like RSI+AROON, MA+STDEV, DOCHIAN+EMA and more to add an additional layer of noise reduction in the trading strategy.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses robust signals like RSI+AROON, BOLLER+STOCHASTIC and SMA+EMA with temporal filters for rare combinations. It also considers entry when close price is above Bollinger Upper Band and RSI > 50 and ADX > 25. Exit occurs when close crosses Bollinger Middle band or ADX < 20. This strategy aims to reduce noise in trading by using these indicators. The main weakness could be lack of diversification as it uses at least two positive anchors (direction, filter or risk management). If results are poor (negative return), changing the direction anchor might help but that will also introduce new weaknesses. Modifying the filter might not have a big impact unless it's combined with other changes and if results are mediocre (low Sharpe ratio) increasing volatility might improve returns while maintaining low drawdowns.
[Backup plan] 1. If results are poor, changing the direction anchor can be tried but that will also introduce new weaknesses. 2. Modifying the filter may not have a big impact unless combined with other changes and if results are mediocre, increasing volatility might improve returns while maintaining low drawdowns

iterations.hypothesis: Using the family robust indicators such as RSI and Bollinger bands to create a trading strategy with EMA and ATR. However, do not reintroduce at least two positive confirmed logical conditions.
The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR will provide a robust trading strategy by incorporating multiple indicators for trend identification and volatility analysis.
